raw.subject: Your Oshkosh page caught my eye
raw.body:
Hi,

Your post about the special event in Appleton caught my eye - it's great to see you're spreading the love for Neapolitan style pizzas to new areas! The customized box truck is a fantastic touch.

But I noticed you don't have your own website yet, which might make it harder for customers to find you and book events. As a special events-focused food truck, having a simple site could help you stay one step ahead of the game.

I sketched out a homepage idea using some of your Facebook photos and posts. It includes a menu hero section, a block for your hours, a photo gallery, and a map to help people find you.

https://sites.damianbasilio.dev/preview/the-dough-truck-oshkosh

Building a site like this is a straightforward project with a flat fee for local businesses - I'd love to discuss the details with you. Would you like to reply or take a quick call to explore further?
